first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning in both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions highlight the candidate's technical strengths while consistently noting the same gaps in German language proficiency, formal architectural design (UML), and executive-level leadership. The minor differences in phrasing are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and are not tied to the change in dates, which made the candidate appear older.
